item.title:
NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 30min Full emergency pod available now.
Thanks to @JoelMBeall for hopping on to talk abou
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 30min Full emergency pod available now.
Thanks to @JoelMBeall for hopping on to talk about LIV and what the future of the league might look like. open.spotify.com 1147: What is going on with LIV Golf? No Laying Up - Golf Podcast · Episode 1 34 8 mil

item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 7h I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized cr
item.description:
Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 7h I was getting ready to hit my tee shot on 18 with my 3 wd and noticed a decent sized crack on the face
All the trucks are gone so the rep is trying to get it shipped overnight.
My head pro from home is also shipping my back up from my locker.
For now, I stole Max Homa’s Mostrar más 167 36 4 mil 390 mil

item.title: Mike_kim714: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 2h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 Also shoutout to tour players. Many offered their back up
item.description: Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 2h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 Also shoutout to tour players. Many offered their back up 3wd for me to try. One even got my number thru someone else to reach out and tell them to try their back up. We’re competing with one another but at the same time want to help out whenever possible. 20 8 694 21 mil

item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 2h “Walking is so much more enjoyable than riding.”
Do you agree? 93 13 175 36 mil
item.description:
NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 2h “Walking is so much more enjoyable than riding.”
Do you agree? 93 13 175 36 mil

item.title: ShaneRyanHere: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 2h Probably been said by a million people already, but if you're the Tour and you sense LIV
item.description: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 2h Probably been said by a million people already, but if you're the Tour and you sense LIV is only operating through end of year, a way to deal a death blow is to make it clear you're counting a year from last conflicting date. And then offer Rahm and Bryson the Brooks deal again. 21 8 191 45 mil

item.title: ShaneRyanHere: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 2h En respuesta a @ShaneRyanHere Basically, put current players in position of deciding whe
item.description: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 2h En respuesta a @ShaneRyanHere Basically, put current players in position of deciding whether to finish out LIV season or just stop now so the clock can start ticking earlier. Hell, even invent a special rule that anyone who quits now gets to start in Jan. 2027. 5 2 67 20 mil

item.title:
NoLayingUp: No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 2h Emergency Pod Time
Come hang as we try to decipher the truth from the noise and discuss
item.description:
No Laying Up @NoLayingUp · 2h Emergency Pod Time
Come hang as we try to decipher the truth from the noise and discuss what the heck is going on with LIV.
Presented by @Titleist . No Laying Up @NoLayingUp NLU Live: What's going on with LIV Golf? 8 2 124 27 mil
